title: The Picky Herbalist
description: A player claimed ingredients 1 and 2 make R+. The actual result had the same sign but a different colour. Which ingredient sheet clue narrows down the colour?

hints.text: A sign-only match means the actual potion had the same sign as the claim, but a different colour.
Claimed R+, sign_ok → actual is G+ or B+. The aspect sheet tells you something about ingredient 1's G aspect.
Ingredient 1 has G−, so mixing can only produce G+ if both ingredients have G+. Since i1 has G−, the resolver must be B (both have B+). Answer: B+.
